parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflowRunId: Number($json.workflowRunId), source: $json.source, templateId: $json.templateId, qualityProfile: $json.qualityProfile, durationSec: Number($json.durationSec), captionMode: 'none', hook: $json.hook, cta: $json.cta }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ render_payload: JSON.stringify($json.renderJob), render_status: 'remotion_preparing', shotstack_status: 'preparing', final_video_status: 'processing', pipeline_status: 'rendering_requested', template_id: $json.renderJob.render.templateId, quality_profile: $json.renderJob.render.qualityProfile, render_engine: 'remotion' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ shotstack_render_id: $json.renderId, shotstack_status: 'done', shotstack_url: $json.outputUrl, thumbnail_url: $json.thumbnailUrl || null, final_video_status: 'ready', render_status: 'remotion_rendered', pipeline_status: 'render_ready', render_engine: 'remotion', quality_profile: $json.qualityProfile || $('Build Render Job').item.json.renderJob.render.qualityProfile, template_id: $('Build Render Job').item.json.renderJob.render.templateId }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, contentIdeaId: $('Build Render Job').item.json.contentIdeaId, workflowRunId: $('Build Render Job').item.json.workflowRunId, status: 'rendered', engine: 'remotion', shotstackRenderId: $('HTTP: RenderVideo Render').item.json.renderId, outputUrl: $('HTTP: RenderVideo Render').item.json.outputUrl } }}
